description_long: This rifle features a long, cylindrical black barrel with a prominent front sight and a slim, skeletonized metal stock at the rear. The receiver and magazine are also black, with a curved detachable box magazine extending downward in front of the trigger guard. The grip and fore-end are made of wood, providing a contrasting brown color and ergonomic handling. The overall design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments, and the rifle appears to be constructed primarily from metal with wooden accents. The stock is a skeletonized folding type, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights. The finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights on the metal surfaces.
description: A black rifle with a long barrel, skeletonized folding stock, wooden grip and fore-end, and a curved detachable magazine. The rifle has iron sights and a streamlined, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle, front sight, and the curved magazine extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the long barrel, wooden grip and fore-end, skeletonized folding stock, and curved magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the wooden fore-end, grip, and the overall streamlined shape of the rifle.
